Title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User has a valid account, Browser is open
Steps:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter valid email and password
And I click the Login button
Then I should be redirected to the dashboard
Expected Results: User is redirected to dashboard and sees the company logo

Title: Verify error message for invalid password
Preconditions: User has a valid account, Browser is open
Steps:
Given I am on the login page
When I enter valid email and invalid password
And I click the Login button
Then I should see an error message
Expected Results: Error message is displayed and user remains on login page

Title: Verify user can navigate to feature page
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the dashboard
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the dashboard
When I click on the Feature menu item in the sidebar
Then I should be redirected to the Feature page
Expected Results: Feature page is displayed with the expected heading and table

Title: Verify form validation for empty required fields
Preconditions: User is logged in, User is on the form page
Steps:
Given I am on the form page
When I leave all required fields empty
And I click the Submit button
Then I should see validation error messages for each required field
Expected Results: Validation errors displayed for each empty required field; form is not submitted

Title: Verify API returns correct response for valid request
Preconditions: API server is running, Valid auth token is available
Steps:
Given I have a valid authentication token
When I send a GET request to /api/resource
Then the response status code should be 200
And the response body should contain expected fields
Expected Results: Response status 200 with valid JSON body containing required fields
